body.processed:
Join us for our signature Annual Spring Gala, an enchanting evening of fine dining, live entertainment, and dancing in the Grand Ballroom. This black-tie affair celebrates the arrival of spring with seasonal cuisine, flowing champagne, and a live orchestra.

Evening Schedule

  • 6:00 PM - Cocktail reception on the Garden Terrace
  • 7:30 PM - Seated dinner in the Grand Ballroom
  • 9:00 PM - Live orchestra and dancing
  • 11:00 PM - Dessert lounge and nightcap

image.alt: Elegant gala event with guests in formal attire

body.processed:
Every Friday evening through the summer, our Rooftop Lounge transforms into a live jazz venue. Enjoy craft cocktails, small plates, and world-class jazz performers against the backdrop of a stunning sunset. No tickets required for hotel guests.

Featured artists rotate weekly, showcasing both established jazz legends and emerging talents from the local scene.

image.alt: Jazz musicians performing on rooftop at sunset

body.processed:
Tour all of our stunning venues, meet our preferred vendors, and sample cuisine from our award-winning catering team at our annual Spring Bridal Showcase. Engaged couples will enjoy complimentary champagne, live floral demonstrations, and exclusive booking incentives.

What to Expect

  • Guided tours of all event spaces
  • Food and cake tastings
  • Live floral arrangement demonstrations
  • DJ and band showcases
  • Exclusive same-day booking discounts
